verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et regina Saba, audita fama Salomonis in nomine Domini, venit tentare eum in ænigmatibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַֽלְכַּת־שְׁבָ֗א שֹׁמַ֛עַת אֶת־שֵׁ֥מַע שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה לְשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה וַתָּבֹ֥א לְנַסֹּת֖וֹ בְּחִידֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the queen of Saba having heard of the fame of Solomon in the name of the Lord, came to try him with hard questions.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rikkaan Arabian kuningatar oli kuullut Salomon sanoman Herran nimestä, ja tuli koettelemaan häntä tapauksilla.
verses.king_james: And when the queen of Sheba heard of the fame of Solomon concerning the name of the Lord, she came to prove him with hard questions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ingressa Jerusalem multo cum comitatu et divitiis, camelis portantibus aromata, et aurum infinitum nimis, et gemmas pretiosas, venit ad regem Salomonem, et locuta est ei universa quæ habebat in corde suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּבֹ֣א יְרוּשָׁלַ֗͏ְמָה בְּחַ֘יִל֮ כָּבֵ֣ד מְאֹד֒ גְּ֠מַלִּ֠ים נֹשְׂאִ֨ים בְּשָׂמִ֧ים וְזָהָ֛ב רַב־מְאֹ֖ד וְאֶ֣בֶן יְקָרָ֑ה וַתָּבֹא֙ אֶל־שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה וַתְּדַבֵּ֣ר אֵלָ֔יו אֵ֛ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָיָ֖ה עִם־לְבָבָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And entering into Jerusalem with a great train, and riches, and camels that carried spices, and an immense quantity of gold, and precious stones, she came to king Solomon, and spoke to him all that she had in her heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tuli Jerusalemiin sangen suuren joukon kanssa, kamelein kanssa, jotka jaloja yrttejä kannattivat, ja aivan paljon kultaa ja kalliita kiviä. Ja kuin hän tuli kuningas Salomon tykö, puhui hän hänelle kaikki, mitä hän sydämessänsä aikonut oli.
verses.king_james: And she came to Jerusalem with a very great train, with camels that bare spices, and very much gold, and precious stones: and when she was come to Solomon, she communed with him of all that was in her heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et docuit eam Salomon omnia verba quæ proposuerat : non fuit sermo qui regem posset latere, et non responderet ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגֶּד־לָ֥הּ שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה אֶת־כׇּל־דְּבָרֶ֑יהָ לֹֽא־הָיָ֤ה דָבָר֙ נֶעְלָ֣ם מִן־הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹ֦א הִגִּ֖יד לָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon informed her of all the things she proposed to him: there was not any word the king was ignorant of, and which he could not answer her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo ilmoitti hänelle kaikki hänen sanansa: ei ollut mitään kuninkaalta salattu, jota ei hän hänelle ilmoittanut.
verses.king_james: And Solomon told her all her questions: there was not any thing hid from the king, which he told her not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videns autem regina Saba omnem sapientiam Salomonis, et domum quam ædificaverat,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֙רֶא֙ מַֽלְכַּת־שְׁבָ֔א אֵ֖ת כׇּל־חׇכְמַ֣ת שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה וְהַבַּ֖יִת אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the queen of Saba saw all the wisdom of Solomon, and the house which he had built,
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska rikkaan Arabian kuningatar näki kaiken Salomon taidon ja huoneen, jonka hän rakentanut oli,
verses.king_james: And when the queen of Sheba had seen all Solomon’s wisdom, and the house that he had built,

verses.latin_vulgate: et cibos mensæ ejus, et habitacula servorum, et ordines ministrantium, vestesque eorum, et pincernas, et holocausta quæ offerebat in domo Domini : non habebat ultra spiritum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַאֲכַ֣ל שֻׁלְחָנ֡וֹ וּמוֹשַׁ֣ב עֲבָדָיו֩ וּמַעֲמַ֨ד מְשָׁרְתָ֜ו וּמַלְבֻּֽשֵׁיהֶם֙ וּמַשְׁקָ֔יו וְעֹ֣לָת֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר יַעֲלֶ֖ה בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹא־הָ֥יָה בָ֛הּ ע֖וֹד רֽוּחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the meat of his table, and the apartments of his servants, and the order of his ministers, and their apparel, and the cupbearers, and the holocausts, which he offered in the house of the Lord, she had no longer any spirit in her;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ruat hänen pöydällänsä, ja hänen palveliainsa asuinsiat, kunkin heidän virkansa, ja heidän vaatteensa, ja hänen juomansa laskiat ja polttouhrinsa, jonka hän Herran huoneessa uhrasi, tuli hän liki hengettömäksi.
verses.king_james: And the meat of his table, and the sitting of his servants, and the attendance of his ministers, and their apparel, and his cupbearers, and his ascent by which he went up unto the house of the Lord; there was no more spirit in her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad regem : Verus est sermo quem audivi in terra mea
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ אֱמֶת֙ הָיָ֣ה הַדָּבָ֔ר אֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׁמַ֖עְתִּי בְּאַרְצִ֑י עַל־דְּבָרֶ֖יךָ וְעַל־חׇכְמָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she said to the king: The report is true, which I heard in my own country,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte sanoi hän kuninkaalle: se on tosi, minkä minä sinusta kuullut olen minun maalleni, ja sinun menostas, ja sinun taidostas.
verses.king_james: And she said to the king, It was a true report that I heard in mine own land of thy acts and of thy wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: super sermonibus tuis, et super sapientia tua : et non credebam narrantibus mihi, donec ipsa veni, et vidi oculis meis, et probavi quod media pars mihi nuntiata non fuerit : major est sapientia et opera tua, quam rumor quem audivi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־הֶאֱמַ֣נְתִּי לַדְּבָרִ֗ים עַ֤ד אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֙אתִי֙ וַתִּרְאֶ֣ינָה עֵינַ֔י וְהִנֵּ֥ה לֹֽא־הֻגַּד־לִ֖י הַחֵ֑צִי הוֹסַ֤פְתָּ חׇכְמָה֙ וָט֔וֹב אֶל־הַשְּׁמוּעָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׁמָֽעְתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Concerning thy words, and concerning thy wisdom. And I did not believe them that told me, till I came myself, and saw with my own eyes, and have found that the half hath not been told me: thy wisdom and thy works exceed the fame which I heard.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja en minä uskonut sitä ennenkuin minä tulin itse, ja minä olen sen nyt silmilläni nähnyt, ja katso, ei ole minulle puoliakaan sanottu: sinulla on enempi taitoa ja hyvyyttä, kuin sanoma on, jonka minä kuullut olen.
verses.king_james: Howbeit I believed not the words, until I came, and mine eyes had seen it: and, behold, the half was not told me: thy wisdom and prosperity exceedeth the fame which I heard.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beati viri tui, et beati servi tui, qui stant coram te semper, et audiunt sapientiam tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֣י אֲנָשֶׁ֔יךָ אַשְׁרֵ֖י עֲבָדֶ֣יךָ אֵ֑לֶּה הָעֹמְדִ֤ים לְפָנֶ֙יךָ֙ תָּמִ֔יד הַשֹּׁמְעִ֖ים אֶת־חׇכְמָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed are thy men, and blessed are thy servants, who stand before thee always, and hear thy wisdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuaat ovat sinun miehes ja sinun palvelias, jotka aina sinun edessäs seisovat ja kuuntelevat sinun taitoas.
verses.king_james: Happy are thy men, happy are these thy servants, which stand continually before thee, and that hear thy wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sit Dominus Deus tuus benedictus, cui complacuisti, et posuit te super thronum Israël, eo quod dilexerit Dominus Israël in sempiternum, et constituit te regem ut faceres judicium et justitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִ֨י יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ בָּר֔וּךְ אֲשֶׁר֙ חָפֵ֣ץ בְּךָ֔ לְתִתְּךָ֖ עַל־כִּסֵּ֣א יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בְּאַהֲבַ֨ת יְהֹוָ֤ה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לְעֹלָ֔ם וַיְשִֽׂימְךָ֣ לְמֶ֔לֶךְ לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת מִשְׁפָּ֖ט וּצְדָקָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord thy God, whom thou hast pleased, and who hath set thee upon the throne of Israel, because the Lord hath loved Israel for ever, and hath appointed thee king, to do judgment and justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra sinun Jumalas, joka sinuun on mielistynyt, sinun Israelin istuimelle pannaksensa! Sentähden että Herra rakastaa Israelia ijankaikkisesti, on hän pannut sinun kuninkaaksi tuomiota ja oikeutta tekemään.
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord thy God, which delighted in thee, to set thee on the throne of Israel: because the Lord loved Israel for ever, therefore made he thee king, to do judgment and justice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dedit ergo regi centum viginti talenta auri, et aromata multa nimis, et gemmas pretiosas : non sunt allata ultra aromata tam multa, quam ea quæ dedit regina Saba regi Salomoni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּתֵּ֨ן לַמֶּ֜לֶךְ מֵאָ֥ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֣ים ׀ כִּכַּ֣ר זָהָ֗ב וּבְשָׂמִ֛ים הַרְבֵּ֥ה מְאֹ֖ד וְאֶ֣בֶן יְקָרָ֑ה לֹ֣א בָא֩ כַבֹּ֨שֶׂם הַה֥וּא עוֹד֙ לָרֹ֔ב אֲשֶׁר־נָתְנָ֥ה מַֽלְכַּת־שְׁבָ֖א לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she gave the king a hundred and twenty talents of gold, and of spices a very great store, and precious stones: there was brought no more such abundance of spices as these which the queen of Saba gave to king Solomon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän antoi kuninkaalle kaksikymmentä toistasataa sentneriä kultaa ja sangen paljon jaloja yrttejä ja kalliita kiviä. Ei tullut sinne sitte niin paljo kalliita yrttejä, kuin rikkaan Arabian kuningatar kuningas Salomolle antoi;
verses.king_james: And she gave the king an hundred and twenty talents of gold, and of spices very great store, and precious stones: there came no more such abundance of spices as these which the queen of Sheba gave to king Solomon.

verses.latin_vulgate: (Sed et classis Hiram, quæ portabat aurum de Ophir, attulit ex Ophir ligna thyina multa nimis, et gemmas pretiosas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם֙ אֳנִ֣י חִירָ֔ם אֲשֶׁר־נָשָׂ֥א זָהָ֖ב מֵאוֹפִ֑יר הֵבִ֨יא מֵאֹפִ֜יר עֲצֵ֧י אַלְמֻגִּ֛ים הַרְבֵּ֥ה מְאֹ֖ד וְאֶ֥בֶן יְקָרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: (The navy also of Hiram, which brought gold from Ophir, brought from Ophir great plenty of thyine trees, and precious stones.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen myös Hiramin haahdet, jotka kultaa toivat Ophirista, ja sangen paljo Hebenin puita ja kalliita kiviä.
verses.king_james: And the navy also of Hiram, that brought gold from Ophir, brought in from Ophir great plenty of almug trees, and precious stones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque rex de lignis thyinis fulcra domus Domini et domus regiæ, et citharas lyrasque cantoribus : non sunt allata hujuscemodi ligna thyina, neque visa usque in præsentem diem.)
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ הַ֠מֶּ֠לֶךְ אֶת־עֲצֵ֨י הָאַלְמֻגִּ֜ים מִסְעָ֤ד לְבֵית־יְהֹוָה֙ וּלְבֵ֣ית הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וְכִנֹּר֥וֹת וּנְבָלִ֖ים לַשָּׁרִ֑ים לֹ֣א בָא־כֵ֞ן עֲצֵ֤י אַלְמֻגִּים֙ וְלֹ֣א נִרְאָ֔ה עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king made of the thyine trees the rails of the house of the Lord, and of the king's house: and citterns and harps for singers: there were no such thyine trees as these brought nor seen unto this day.)
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas antoi tehdä Hebenin puista patsaita Herran huoneesen ja kuninkaan huoneesen, ja kanteleet ja harput soittajille. Ei tullut sinne sitte niin paljo Hebenin puita, eikä myös nähty ole tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And the king made of the almug trees pillars for the house of the Lord, and for the king’s house, harps also and psalteries for singers: there came no such almug trees, nor were seen unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex autem Salomon dedit reginæ Saba omnia quæ voluit et petivit ab eo, exceptis his quæ ultro obtulerat ei munere regio. Quæ reversa est, et abiit in terram suam cum servis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַמֶּ֨לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה נָתַ֣ן לְמַֽלְכַּת־שְׁבָ֗א אֶת־כׇּל־חֶפְצָהּ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׁאָ֔לָה מִלְּבַד֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָֽתַן־לָ֔הּ כְּיַ֖ד הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה וַתֵּ֛פֶן וַתֵּ֥לֶךְ לְאַרְצָ֖הּ הִ֥יא וַעֲבָדֶֽיהָ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And king Solomon gave the queen of Saba all that she desired, and asked of him: besides what he offered her of himself of his royal bounty. And she returned, and went to her own country, with her servants.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas Salomo antoi rikkaan Arabian kuningattarelle kaikki, mitä hän pyysi ja anoi häneltä, paitsi mitä hän hänelle itse antoi. Ja hän palasi ja meni palvelioinensa omalle maallensa.
verses.king_james: And king Solomon gave unto the queen of Sheba all her desire, whatsoever she asked, beside that which Solomon gave her of his royal bounty. So she turned and went to her own country, she and her servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erat autem pondus auri quod afferebatur Salomoni per annos singulos, sexcentorum sexaginta sex talentorum auri,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ מִשְׁקַ֣ל הַזָּהָ֔ב אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֥א לִשְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בְּשָׁנָ֣ה אֶחָ֑ת שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֛וֹת שִׁשִּׁ֥ים וָשֵׁ֖שׁ כִּכַּ֥ר זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the weight of the gold that was brought to Solomon every year, was six hundred and sixty-six talents of gold:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kullan paino, jonka he joka vuosi toivat Salomolle, oli kuusisataa ja kuusiseitsemättäkymmentä sentneriä kultaa,
verses.king_james: Now the weight of gold that came to Solomon in one year was six hundred threescore and six talents of gold,

verses.latin_vulgate: excepto eo quod afferebant viri qui super vectigalia erant, et negotiatores, universique scruta vendentes, et omnes reges Arabiæ, ducesque terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְבַד֙ מֵאַנְשֵׁ֣י הַתָּרִ֔ים וּמִסְחַ֖ר הָרֹֽכְלִ֑ים וְכׇל־מַלְכֵ֥י הָעֶ֖רֶב וּפַח֥וֹת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Besides that which the men brought him that were over the tributes, and the merchants, and they that sold by retail, and all the kings of Arabia, and the governors of the country.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ilman sitä mitä kauppamiehet ja yrttein myyjät, niin myös kaikki Arabian kuninkaat ja voimalliset maalta (toivat hänelle.)
verses.king_james: Beside that he had of the merchantmen, and of the traffick of the spice merchants, and of all the kings of Arabia, and of the governors of the country.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque rex Salomon ducenta scuta de auro purissimo : sexcentos auri siclos dedit in laminas scuti unius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַשׂ הַמֶּ֧לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֛ה מָאתַ֥יִם צִנָּ֖ה זָהָ֣ב שָׁח֑וּט שֵֽׁשׁ־מֵא֣וֹת זָהָ֔ב יַעֲלֶ֖ה עַל־הַצִּנָּ֥ה הָאֶחָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon made two hundred shields of the purest gold: he allowed six hundred sicles of gold for the plates of one shield.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas Salomo antoi myös tehdä parhaasta kullasta kaksisataa keihästä, kuusisataa kultapenninkiä antoi hän panna jokaiseen keihääseen;
verses.king_james: And king Solomon made two hundred targets of beaten gold: six hundred shekels of gold went to one target.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et trecentas peltas ex auro probato : trecentæ minæ auri unam peltam vestiebant : posuitque eas rex in domo saltus Libani.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁלֹשׁ־מֵא֤וֹת מָֽגִנִּים֙ זָהָ֣ב שָׁח֔וּט שְׁלֹ֤שֶׁת מָנִים֙ זָהָ֔ב יַעֲלֶ֖ה עַל־הַמָּגֵ֣ן הָאֶחָ֑ת וַיִּתְּנֵ֣ם הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ בֵּ֖ית יַ֥עַר הַלְּבָנֽוֹן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And three hundred targets of fine gold: three hundred pounds of gold covered one target: and the king put them in the house of the forest of Libanus.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kolmesataa kilpeä parhaasta kullasta, ja kolme leiviskää kultaa jokaiseen kilpeen; ja kuningas pani ne Libanonin metsähuoneesen.
verses.king_james: And he made three hundred shields of beaten gold; three pound of gold went to one shield: and the king put them in the house of the forest of Lebanon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit etiam rex Salomon thronum de ebore grandem : et vestivit eum auro fulvo nimis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ הַמֶּ֛לֶךְ כִּסֵּא־שֵׁ֖ן גָּד֑וֹל וַיְצַפֵּ֖הוּ זָהָ֥ב מוּפָֽז׃
verses.douay_rheims: King Solomon also made a great throne of ivory: and overlaid it with the finest gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas teki suuren istuimen elephantin luista, ja kultasi sen selkiällä kullalla;
verses.king_james: Moreover the king made a great throne of ivory, and overlaid it with the best gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui habebat sex gradus : et summitas throni rotunda erat in parte posteriori : et duæ manus hinc atque inde tenentes sedile : et duo leones stabant juxta manus singulas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֵׁ֧שׁ מַעֲל֣וֹת לַכִּסֵּ֗ה וְרֹאשׁ־עָגֹ֤ל לַכִּסֵּה֙ מֵֽאַחֲרָ֔יו וְיָדֹ֛ת מִזֶּ֥ה וּמִזֶּ֖ה אֶל־מְק֣וֹם הַשָּׁ֑בֶת וּשְׁנַ֣יִם אֲרָי֔וֹת עֹמְדִ֖ים אֵ֥צֶל הַיָּדֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: It had six steps: and the top of the throne was round behind: and there were two hands on either side holding the seat: and two lions stood, one at each hand,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siinä istuimessa oli kuusi astuinlautaa, ja sen istuimen pää oli ympyriäinen takaapäin, ja käsipuut olivat molemmilla puolilla istuinta, ja kaksi jalopeuraa seisoi käsipuiden tykönä;
verses.king_james: The throne had six steps, and the top of the throne was round behind: and there were stays on either side on the place of the seat, and two lions stood beside the stays.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et duodecim leunculi stantes super sex gradus hinc atque inde : non est factum tale opus in universis regnis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁנֵ֧ים עָשָׂ֣ר אֲרָיִ֗ים עֹמְדִ֥ים שָׁ֛ם עַל־שֵׁ֥שׁ הַֽמַּעֲל֖וֹת מִזֶּ֣ה וּמִזֶּ֑ה לֹא־נַעֲשָׂ֥ה כֵ֖ן לְכׇל־מַמְלָכֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And twelve little lions stood upon the six steps, on the one side and on the other: there was no such work made in any kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siellä seisoi kaksitoistakymmentä jalopeuraa niiden kuuden astuinlaudan päällä molemmin puolin: ei senkaltaista ole tehty missäkään valtakunnassa.
verses.king_james: And twelve lions stood there on the one side and on the other upon the six steps: there was not the like made in any kingdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et omnia vasa quibus potabat rex Salomon, erant aurea : et universa supellex domus saltus Libani de auro purissimo : non erat argentum, nec alicujus pretii putabatur in diebus Salomonis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠כֹ֠ל כְּלֵ֞י מַשְׁקֵ֨ה הַמֶּ֤לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹה֙ זָהָ֔ב וְכֹ֗ל כְּלֵ֛י בֵּֽית־יַ֥עַר הַלְּבָנ֖וֹן זָהָ֣ב סָג֑וּר אֵ֣ין כֶּ֗סֶף לֹ֥א נֶחְשָׁ֛ב בִּימֵ֥י שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה לִמְאֽוּמָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover, all the vessels out of which king Solomon drank, were of gold: and all the furniture of the house of the forest of Libanus was of most pure gold: there was no silver, nor was any account made of it in the days of Solomon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki kuningas Salomon juoma-astiat olivat selkiästä kullasta, ja jokainen astia Libanonin metsähuoneessa oli myös selkiästä kullasta; sillä ei yksikään huolinut kuningas Salomon aikana hopiasta.
verses.king_james: And all king Solomon’s drinking vessels were of gold, and all the vessels of the house of the forest of Lebanon were of pure gold; none were of silver: it was nothing accounted of in the days of Solomon.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia classis regis per mare cum classe Hiram semel per tres annos ibat in Tharsis, deferens inde aurum, et argentum, et dentes elephantorum, et simias, et pavos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ אֳנִ֨י תַרְשִׁ֤ישׁ לַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ בַּיָּ֔ם עִ֖ם אֳנִ֣י חִירָ֑ם אַחַת֩ לְשָׁלֹ֨שׁ שָׁנִ֜ים תָּב֣וֹא ׀ אֳנִ֣י תַרְשִׁ֗ישׁ נֹֽשְׂאֵת֙ זָהָ֣ב וָכֶ֔סֶף שֶׁנְהַבִּ֥ים וְקֹפִ֖ים וְתֻכִּיִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the king's navy, once in three years, went with the navy of Hiram by sea to Tharsis, and brought from thence gold, and silver, and elephants' teeth, and apes, and peacocks.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kuninkaalla oli haaksi Tarsis merellä Hiramin haahden kanssa; ja haaksi Tarsis tuli joka kolmantena vuotena kerran ja toi kultaa, hopiaa, elephantin hampaita, apinoita ja riikinkukkoja.
verses.king_james: For the king had at sea a navy of Tharshish with the navy of Hiram: once in three years came the navy of Tharshish, bringing gold, and silver, ivory, and apes, and peacocks.

verses.latin_vulgate: Magnificatus est ergo rex Salomon super omnes reges terræ divitiis et sapientia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגְדַּל֙ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה מִכֹּ֖ל מַלְכֵ֣י הָאָ֑רֶץ לְעֹ֖שֶׁר וּלְחׇכְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Solomon exceeded all the kings of the earth in riches and wisdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja näin kuningas Salomo on tullut suuremmaksi kaikkia kuninkaita maan päällä, rikkaudessa ja viisaudessa.
verses.king_james: So king Solomon exceeded all the kings of the earth for riches and for wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et universa terra desiderabat vultum Salomonis, ut audiret sapientiam ejus, quam dederat Deus in corde ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇ֨ל־הָאָ֔רֶץ מְבַקְשִׁ֖ים אֶת־פְּנֵ֣י שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה לִשְׁמֹ֙עַ֙ אֶת־חׇכְמָת֔וֹ אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן אֱלֹהִ֖ים בְּלִבּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the earth desired to see Solomon's face, to hear his wisdom, which God had given in his heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki maailma pyysi nähdä Salomoa, kuullaksensa sitä taitoa, jonka Jumala oli antanut hänen sydämeensä.
verses.king_james: And all the earth sought to Solomon, to hear his wisdom, which God had put in his heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et singuli deferebant ei munera, vasa argentea et aurea, vestes et arma bellica, aromata quoque, et equos et mulos per annos singulos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵ֣מָּה מְבִאִ֣ים אִ֣ישׁ מִנְחָת֡וֹ כְּלֵ֣י כֶ֩סֶף֩ וּכְלֵ֨י זָהָ֤ב וּשְׂלָמוֹת֙ וְנֵ֣שֶׁק וּבְשָׂמִ֔ים סוּסִ֖ים וּפְרָדִ֑ים דְּבַר־שָׁנָ֖ה בְּשָׁנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And every one brought him presents, vessels of silver and of gold, garments, and armour, and spices, and horses, and mules, every year.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he kukin toivat hänelle lahjoja, hopia-astioita ja kultaisia kaluja, ja vaatteita, ja haarniskoita, ja yrttejä, ja hevosia, ja muuleja, joka vuosi.
verses.king_james: And they brought every man his present, vessels of silver, and vessels of gold, and garments, and armour, and spices, horses, and mules, a rate year by year.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregavitque Salomon currus et equites, et facti sunt ei mille quadringenti currus, et duodecim millia equitum : et disposuit eos per civitates munitas, et cum rege in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּאֱסֹ֣ף שְׁלֹמֹה֮ רֶ֣כֶב וּפָרָשִׁים֒ וַֽיְהִי־ל֗וֹ אֶ֤לֶף וְאַרְבַּע־מֵאוֹת֙ רֶ֔כֶב וּשְׁנֵים־עָשָׂ֥ר אֶ֖לֶף פָּרָשִׁ֑ים וַיַּנְחֵם֙ בְּעָרֵ֣י הָרֶ֔כֶב וְעִם־הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon gathered together chariots and horsemen, and he had a thousand four hundred chariots, and twelve thousand horsemen: and he bestowed them in fenced cities, and with the king in Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo kokosi vaunuja ja ratsasmiehiä, niin että hänellä oli tuhannen ja neljäsataa vaunua ja kaksitoistakymmentä tuhatta ratsasmiestä; ne hän pani vaunukaupunkeihin ja kuninkaan tykö Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: And Solomon gathered together chariots and horsemen: and he had a thousand and four hundred chariots, and twelve thousand horsemen, whom he bestowed in the cities for chariots, and with the king at Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque ut tanta esset abundantia argenti in Jerusalem, quanta et lapidum : et cedrorum præbuit multitudinem quasi sycomoros quæ nascuntur in campestribus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֨ן הַמֶּ֧לֶךְ אֶת־הַכֶּ֛סֶף בִּירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם כָּאֲבָנִ֑ים וְאֵ֣ת הָאֲרָזִ֗ים נָתַ֛ן כַּשִּׁקְמִ֥ים אֲשֶׁר־בַּשְּׁפֵלָ֖ה לָרֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made silver to be as plentiful in Jerusalem as stones: and cedars to be as common as sycamores which grow in the plains.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas teki niin, että hopiaa oli niin paljo Jerusalemissa kuin kiviä, ja sedripuita niin paljo kuin villifikunapuita laaksoissa.
verses.king_james: And the king made silver to be in Jerusalem as stones, and cedars made he to be as the sycomore trees that are in the vale, for abundance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et educebantur equi Salomoni de Ægypto, et de Coa. Negotiatores enim regis emebant de Coa, et statuto pretio perducebant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמוֹצָ֧א הַסּוּסִ֛ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לִשְׁלֹמֹ֖ה מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם וּמִקְוֵ֕ה סֹחֲרֵ֣י הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ יִקְח֥וּ מִקְוֵ֖ה בִּמְחִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And horses were brought for Solomon out of Egypt, and Coa: for the king's merchants bought them out of Coa, and brought them at a set price.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomolle tuotiin hevosia Egyptistä, ja kudotuita kaluja, ja kuninkaan kauppamiehet ostivat ne kalut,
verses.king_james: And Solomon had horses brought out of Egypt, and linen yarn: the king’s merchants received the linen yarn at a price.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egrediebatur autem quadriga ex Ægypto sexcentis siclis argenti, et equus centum quinquaginta. Atque in hunc modum cuncti reges Hethæorum et Syriæ equos venundabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֠תַּעֲלֶ֠ה וַתֵּצֵ֨א מֶרְכָּבָ֤ה מִמִּצְרַ֙יִם֙ בְּשֵׁ֣שׁ מֵא֣וֹת כֶּ֔סֶף וְס֖וּס בַּחֲמִשִּׁ֣ים וּמֵאָ֑ה וְ֠כֵ֠ן לְכׇל־מַלְכֵ֧י הַחִתִּ֛ים וּלְמַלְכֵ֥י אֲרָ֖ם בְּיָדָ֥ם יֹצִֽאוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And a chariot of four horses came out of Egypt, for six hundred sicles of silver, and a horse for a hundred and fifty. And after this manner did all the kings of the Hethites, and of Syria, sell horses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja toivat Egyptistä jokaisen vaunun kuudensadan hopiapenningin edestä, ja hevosen sadan ja viidenkymmenen hopiapenningin edestä. Niin veivät he niitä myös kättensä kautta kaikkein Hetiläisten kuningasten ja Syrian kuningasten tykö.
verses.king_james: And a chariot came up and went out of Egypt for six hundred shekels of silver, and an horse for an hundred and fifty: and so for all the kings of the Hittites, and for the kings of Syria, did they bring them out by their means.
